Smt. Wan suk Syiem, Markynti Lodge-64, Madanrting, Shillong, Meghalaya-793021. Ms Hemlata Kheria, 7215506, Raiger Pura, Karol Bagh New Delhi-110005. 3. Wansuk Syiem, Ms. Hemlata Kheria and Ms. Nirrna la Samant Prabhavalkar shall hold office for a period of three years from the date of assumption of charge of office or until further orders, whichever is earlier.
